race.description: Ladbrokes Summer Sprint Series Heat 5 Handicap
race.comment: Small field but good race. BON'S PRIDE (3) has worked to the line strongly over 1100m and 1300m in the two runs from a spell but boasts a top record this course and distance. Also has great stats when third-up and gets a chance to break through. FORMS OF FEAR (4) is racing in great heart and led throughout for a two-length win here last time. Top record course and distance and will take catching again. ZOURATA (1) has been hard to fault with two all the way wins here last two starts, both over 1100m. The latest was by eight lengths. Only query is the extra ground - record falls away beyond 1100m. Hard to knock the latest win and will be in this for a long way. GREAT BUY (2) is fitter and next best.
